title: CEGM's One Piece Datapack
description: Hey Guys, this was the 2nd datapack I ever made.  It adds in 11 fruits from the popular anime and manga series "One Piece".  Some of these fruits aren't super accurate but I think the pack turned out good none the less.  I hope you guys like it :D
body:
# Info
Hey Guys, this was the 2nd datapack I ever made.  It adds in 11 fruits from the popular anime and manga series "One Piece".  Some of these fruits aren't super accurate but I think the pack turned out good none the less.  Also, you can find every fruit in shipwrecks and Haki in dungeons
## Items
 -Haki Scrolls
 -Chop Chop Fruit
 -Rumble Rumble Fruit
 -Soul Soul Fruit
 -Revive Revive Fruit
 -Gold Gold Fruit
 -Candy Candy Fruit
 -Strength Strength Fruit
 -Dark Dark Fruit
 -Dog Dog Fruit(Model Dachshund)
 -Quake Quake Fruit
